  "brief_explanation": "The change in unrecognized tax benefits from the end of 2014 to the end of 2015 is calculated by subtracting the balance at December 31, 2015 (which is $1171 million) from the balance at January 1, 2015 (which is $1171 million). The result is a reduction of $18 million."

financial_answer.brief_explanation: The change in unrecognized tax benefits from the end of 2014 to the end of 2015 is calculated by subtracting the balance at December 31, 2015 (which is $1171 million) from the balance at January 1, 2015 (which is $1171 million). The result is a reduction of $18 million.
